approach: Fold un-blocked base-layout characters into the script classifier's produced evidence, entirely inside the tool-owned facet-index utility. Resolve the leak source to the environment-default kbdus table (pinned tool-owned JSON), enumerate base-layer vkeys named by no rule, and add each un-named key's Latin char as a distribution-only sliver that never flips the dominant script. No engine/IR/buildProducedSet change.

decisions.decision: Fold base-layout fall-through in the script classifier, not in buildProducedSet
decisions.why: buildProducedSet is a shared contract (engine inventory diff + keyboard-lint coverage) meaning glyphs the rules produce; fall-through is a desktop-classification concern local to the script facet
decisions.rejected: Extending buildProducedSet or the KeyboardIR/codec to model fall-through

decisions.decision: Leaked base-layout evidence is distribution-only; dominant value selected from rule-produced histogram
decisions.why: Spec requires a minor distribution sliver, never a dominant-value flip; evidence-only makes never-flips a guarantee not a probability
decisions.rejected: Counting leaked chars as full evidence everywhere (could flip a passthrough non-Latin keyboard to Latn)

decisions.decision: Leak source is always the environment default kbdus; baselayout() context guards recorded in notes only
decisions.why: Verified in ../keyman: baselayout is a synonym for if(&baselayout), a context TEST against a host environment store (default kbdus.dll); a keyboard cannot declare its base layout, so the spec assumption of a settable &baselayout store is incorrect
decisions.rejected: Treating a baselayout(azerty) guard as a declaration and leaking AZERTY chars (factually wrong + non-deterministic + needs out-of-scope tables)

plan.summary: Plan folds un-blocked base-layout chars into the script classifier as a distribution-only sliver, tool-local, forcing a script schemaVersion bump + index recompute
plan.key_finding: Upstream ../keyman confirms baselayout is a context guard against a host-supplied environment store (default kbdus.dll), not a keyboard-settable declaration; corrects the spec assumption

tasks.summary: 22 tasks across 6 phases, story-organized (US1 MVP leak sliver, US2 safety guarantees, US3 versioned deterministic recompute); all work tool-local to utilities/facet-index, no producedSet/IR/codec change
tasks.key_finding: Classifier fold (T008-T013) all edits one file script-classifier.ts so must run sequentially; leaked evidence is distribution-only with dominant/confidence computed before the fold

concerns.note: T012 touch-only no-op relies on an undefined predicate: for a touch-only IR namedBaseLayerVkeys is empty so leakedChars returns the full A-Z alphabet (non-empty), so a leakedChars-empty guard fails to fire and would leak all 26 Latin letters, breaking SC-004/FR-010. Add an explicit has-base-layer-rule-surface predicate in base-layout.ts (T003/T004) and gate T012 on it.
